public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as apprentice factor.
manner: Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a apprentice factor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of apprentice factor in and around Stoneforge Depot, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Stoneforge Depot workable through the obligations of apprentice factor while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must read timing, trust, and supply pressure early enough that a market problem does not become a civic one. Around Stoneforge Depot, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of apprentice factor visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Lysa Mere will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.
Lysa Mere needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around Stoneforge Depot before trust collapses.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Lysa Mere read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Stoneforge Depot: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value

first_impression: Lysa Mere presents as Negotiates in practical terms, weighing people, timing, shortage, and leverage together. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a apprentice factor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Apprentice Factor, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Transpolity.
what_they_refuse: Lysa Mere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Apprentice Factor too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Lysa Mere can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Lysa Mere adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Lysa Mere is Known locally through day-to-day work as apprentice factor. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Apprentice Factor.
